  "findings": [
    "Stored hydraulic, gravity, or capacitor energy source not isolated or dissipated during lockout/tagout preparation",
    "Failure to control all hazardous energy sources violates OSHA 1910.147 requirements for energy control procedures"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop work on affected equipment",
    "Identify and isolate all stored energy sources (hydraulic, gravity, capacitor)",
    "Verify dissipation or restraint of stored energy before re-authorizing work"
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1910.147 mandates that all hazardous energy sources be identified and isolated prior to service or maintenance. Missing stored energy sources such as hydraulic pressure, gravitational potential, or capacitor discharge leaves workers exposed to unexpected energization or release, which is a critical safety violation.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(4)(ii) Energy control procedure elements",
    "OSHA 1910.147(d)(5) Release of stored energy",
    "OSHA 1910.147(d)(6) Verification of isolation"
  ]
}
